---
title: "Halton rapids at night"
date: 2021-03-31
categories: ["halton-rapids","club: lancaster","whitewater","night"]
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/cvDuGdTgiIEgIQdPHSZXmWVglDTm3dwNIDEgA-z9sfA-768x576.jpg
---

- Distance: 2.8 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/5046141001)

Dusk & night paddle. 13 paddlers in total. Halton on medium (0.85m). Ran the rapids once stopping at the islands to play. The others then did 2 more laps in the dark whilst I played at the islands. Paul brought glowsticks for everyone and hot cross buns. Lovely way to close the season.


![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/cvDuGdTgiIEgIQdPHSZXmWVglDTm3dwNIDEgA-z9sfA-768x576.jpg)
